collections.name: Mehdi Hassan's Greatest Ghazals
collections.description: Immerse yourself in the soulful rendering of the King of Ghazal, featuring timeless poetry of Faiz, Ghalib, and Faraz.

collections.name: Madam Noor Jehan Film Classics
collections.description: Timeless cinematic masterpieces sung by Malika-e-Taranum (Queen of Melody) Noor Jehan, spanning five decades of Lollywood.

collections.name: Golden Era Qawwalis
collections.description: Ecstatic Sufi devotional qawwalis by Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan and the legendary Sabri Brothers.

collections.name: PTV Nostalgia & Ghazal Classics
collections.description: Nostalgic tracks from the Golden Era of Pakistan Television (PTV) broadcasts, including Iqbal Bano, Ghulam Ali, and Nayyara Noor.

collections.name: Lollywood Golden 60s & 70s
collections.description: Upbeat and nostalgic cinematic highlights from Ahmed Rushdi, Alamgir, and Runa Laila.
